title: The 10 Pittsburgh Sweets on Social
subtitle: Bakeries, pastry shops, ice cream, dessert
angle: which Pittsburgh dessert businesses are showing up online this spring, ranked by creator pickup. Who creators are filming and what those videos reveal.
intro:
Pittsburgh's dessert scene has a social media problem, and it is not what you would expect. The businesses with the deepest review records, the ones that have clearly earned their reputations over years of actual customers, are largely absent from the platforms where those reputations are now being built in real time. Page's in Arlington sits first in this ranking on the strength of 3,145 reviews and genuine creator activity on TikTok, with no account of its own to receive any of it. Kyo Matcha in Squirrel Hill has the strongest creator fit in this entire category, yet its review sentiment has not caught up to what those videos are actually showing.

The pattern that emerges across these eight businesses is a split between legacy and visibility. La Gourmandine's two locations both rank inside the top ten on review depth alone, and both feeds have gone quiet.

What this quarter's rankings cannot yet measure is whether that silence is strategic or simply a gap. Next issue, we track whether any of these businesses close it, and whether the ones creators are already filming start showing up to meet them.

items.name: La Gourmandine Hazelwood
items.descriptor: Sixth In Pittsburgh Sweets, Built On 525 Reviews. The Business Hasn't Posted In Six Weeks.

featured_tiktok.author: melissasadhdlife
featured_tiktok.caption:
I love La Gourmandine, they never disappoint 🥐 🍫 

#pittsburghtreats #patisserie #springpastries

items.playbook_top_move: Break the six-week Instagram silence. Post at minimum twice weekly; the account has been dark for 42 days while creators are actively filming the shop.

items.name: La Gourmandine Lawrenceville
items.descriptor: Eighth In Sweets Despite A Deep Review Record. The Feed Has Gone Quiet.

featured_tiktok.author: melissasadhdlife
featured_tiktok.caption:
I love La Gourmandine, they never disappoint 🥐 🍫 

#pittsburghtreats #patisserie #springpastries

items.playbook_top_move: Restart the Instagram feed consistently. The account has posted zero times in 42 days; even two posts per week featuring named seasonal items would reactivate the momentum signal.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Sweets, Carried By 3,145 Reviews. Creators Are On TikTok; Page's Still Is Not.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account creators built. Four creators generated 87,000 plays this quarter tagging a business with no TikTok presence. Registering an account captures that existing search traffic and named tags.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Sweets, With Creators On TikTok And No Account To Meet Them.

featured_tiktok.author: soysauceyybae

items.playbook_top_move: Address the portion complaint directly. The two most visible critical reviews both cite small portions at Bakery Square; one response on Google can shift the sentiment trajectory before it compounds.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Fourth In Pittsburgh Sweets, With The Family's Strongest Creator Fit And A Review Sentiment That Hasn't Caught Up.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx

items.playbook_top_move: Address the portion and closing consistency gap. Review sentiment sits well below the family median; two separate complaints about soft serve portion variance and a premature close are the specific friction points pulling the number down.

items.name: Millie's Homemade Ice Cream
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Sweets On Review Depth Alone. TikTok Has Not Caught Up Yet.

featured_tiktok.author: maddielovespittsburgh
featured_tiktok.caption:
did you know that the @Millie’s Homemade Ice Cream inside the @Giant Eagle @Giant Eagle Market District at Tje Meridian serves coffee!? well, now you do !!! 🤭☕️🧋🍦💖 

whether you take your coffee black, with a little bit of milk or a who

items.playbook_top_move: Build a TikTok presence from scratch. One creator posted 1,831 plays explaining your coffee offering exists. Claim the account and post 3 short videos this month before someone else defines the brand.

items.name: Treat - Ice Cream and Liege Waffles
items.descriptor: Seventh In Sweets, Carried By 623 Reviews. The Feed Has Been Quiet For Seven Months.
items.playbook_top_move: Restart the Instagram feed now. The account has posted zero times in 200 days; even two posts a week would reactivate a 7.65 percent engagement rate that is already well above average.

items.name: Waffallonia
items.descriptor: Fifth In Pittsburgh Sweets On Review Depth Alone. The Feed Has Gone Silent.
items.playbook_top_move: Restart the Instagram account with product footage. The account has no bio, no recent posts, and is not set to business status; a single weekly Liège waffle pull video would reopen the momentum signal entirely.
